ddls:
CREATE TABLE "traffic_participation" (
  "participation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic participation record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the data was collected */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group of the participants */,
  "traffic_mode_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the mode of traffic */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the unit of measurement */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value of the traffic participation statistic */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "data_quality_score" TEXT /* Data quality score (e.g., 0.0 - 1.0) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_participation_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_participation_traffic_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("traffic_mode_id") REFERENCES traffic_modes ("traffic_mode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_participation_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES data_units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_participation_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the country */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the country */,
  "gdp" TEXT /* GDP of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group (e.g., 0-14Y, 15-24Y) */,
  "age_group_description" TEXT /* Description of the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_modes" (
  "traffic_mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic mode */,
  "traffic_mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the traffic mode (e.g., CARS, BICYCLES) */,
  "traffic_mode_description" TEXT /* Description of the traffic mode */,
  "average_speed" TEXT /* Average speed of the traffic mode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("traffic_mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit of measurement */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit (e.g., Persons) */,
  "unit_description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the record accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each traffic participation record
Reference to the country where the data was collected
Reference to the age group of the participants
Reference to the mode of traffic
Reference to the unit of measurement
Value of the traffic participation statistic
Unique identifier for each age group
Unique identifier for each traffic mode
Name of the traffic mode (e.g., CARS, BICYCLES)
Average speed of the traffic mode

Unique identifier for each log entry
